title: Lead Revenue Manager at Swiggy Restaurant Partners

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at Swiggy Restaurant Partners
jsonLd.description:
We at Swiggy Restaurant Partners are looking for an experienced Revenue Manager based out of Kolkata. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Swiggy Restaurant Partners:
Swiggy Restaurant Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Revenue Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy Restaurant Partners!
